data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. MOTION ACTIVATED drew an outside box and was game in defeat when only 1.5 lengths from the winner Cyclone Leo in second(20.25) at this track. Deserves serious consideration. 2. TYANA BURN is still a maiden after eight runs but rarely out of the placings, the latest filling a minor again when third at this track. Expected to feature. 7. NEUTRON dropped out early but hit the line hard, charging into second and beaten a nose win (20.13) at this track in Maiden. The form out of his last race has been franked. Expected to be in this for a long way. 1. MITTS WHITAKER gets a chance to improve on an unplaced run at his latest outing at this circuit.","runners":[8,2,7,1],"exclusive":false}
